chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1743 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 11.11.2016. Mr. Mumtaz Ahmed Lashari, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w Muhammad Changal o/b of SSP Hyderabad = Today, the learned A.A.G files written statement on behalf of respondent No.2-SSP Hyderabad and states that no FIR has been lodged against the petitioner till date. Petitioners’ Counsel submits that there is apprehension that SHO P.S Airport, Karachi at the behest of respondents No.5 & 6-father and brother of Mst. Iqra, the present petitioner, may lodge a FIR agaisnt petitioner No.2-Abrar Baloch particularly under Section 365-B of PPC. This petition is disposed of with the directions that private respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and the police officials including respondents No.4-SHO P.S Airport will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and desist from causing any harassment to the petitioner at the behest of private respondents and will also provide protection to the petitioners, if police officials are approached with such a request. JUDGE Shahid
